description: UV Seam Smoothing - Gaussian blur in narrow band around UV island boundaries
hypothesis: UV seam artifacts are caused by color discontinuities at UV island boundaries in texture space. Smoothing a narrow band (3-5 texels) at these boundaries should reduce visible seams without affecting interior texture quality.

implementation.location: After inpainting, before dark texel recovery
implementation.technique: Erosion-based UV island boundary detection + Gaussian blur in dilated seam band

notes: Pure post-processing change, zero risk. Smooths base_color, normal_map, metallic, and roughness at UV island boundaries. Expected +1-2 points on smoothness/coherence.
